# discord_members (Data Source)

Fetches the members of a Discord guild (server). This requires the `GUILD_MEMBERS` privileged intent to be enabled for the bot. Returns a single page of up to 1000 members; it does not paginate further.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_members" "all" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) Members of the guild. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `nick` (String) Guild-specific nickname of the member.
- `roles` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the roles assigned to the member.
- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the member's user.
